history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). There is a lava at (2,2) which I need to avoid. A safe path is to move forward to (1,2), then continue to (1,3), then down to (2,3), then down to (3,3). So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,2) facing right. The goal is at (3,3) with lava at (2,2). Moving forward to (1,3) is safe (floor). From there I can turn right and move down to (2,3) and then to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,3) facing right, but there is a wall directly ahead. I need to go down to reach the goal. Turning right will make me face down, then I can move forward onto (2,3) and then to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (1,3) facing down. The goal is directly below at (3,3). Moving forward will take me to (2,3) which is safe floor. Then another forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing down. The goal is directly below at (3,3). Moving forward will take me to the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
